channel.title: WNwildNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from WNwildNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Giant plant that smells like a dead body is about to bloom in Kew Gardens
item.description: The titan arum, nicknamed the ‘corpse flower’, is preparing to open at Kew Gardens’ Princess of Wales Conservatory

item.title: University Lab Worker Tries to Poison Fellow Researcher Over a Promotion
item.description: 41-year-old Makoto Kuroda, a lab worker at the University of Wisconsin, has admitted to attempting to poison a colleague he had been upset with. The p...

item.title: Search for Missing Woman Hampered by Her Excessively Edited Social Media Photos
item.description: A Mexican woman's excessively edited social media photos hampered police efforts to find her because they made her look completely different. The post...

item.title: The World’s Largest Snack Store Sells Over 30,000 Kinds of Snacks from 70 Countries
item.description: Snack Kingdom, the world's largest snack store, covers an area of over 12,000 square meters and sells over 35,000 different snacks from all over the w...

item.title: Bored Man Confesses to Starting Forest Fire for His Own Amusement
item.description: A 22-year-old man in Thailand has confessed to deliberately starting a forest fire in his local area because he was bored and looking for some enterta...
